# gh aw logs

Download and analyze workflow logs with aggregated metrics.

## When to use it

Use when you need execution details from a workflow run.

## How to use it

1. Start with `gh aw logs --help` to see the flags for your installed version.
2. Run the smallest command that answers your immediate need.
3. Review the diff or GitHub-side effect before moving on when the command changes repository state.

## Example commands

- `gh aw logs daily-gh-aw-training`
- `gh aw logs daily-gh-aw-training --help`

## Notes

- Use `audit` if you want a more opinionated report on the same run.

## Verify

- Re-run `gh aw logs --help` if you are unsure about supported flags in the installed release.
